title: iva ambrosiifolia
intro: Iva ambrosiifolia, also known as Marsh Elder or Elder Bush, is a type of flowering plant native to North America, particularly in wetland areas. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Iva ambrosiifolia include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Iva ambrosiifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
